channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: Egyptian Traditional Crafts: A Living Heritage
item.description: A guide to Egyptian traditional crafts: khayamiya tentmaking, copper and brasswork, alabaster carving, weaving, and where to see artisans working today.

item.title: Coptic Heritage in Egypt: History & Community
item.description: An introduction to Coptic Christianity in Egypt: its origins, Old Cairo's churches and monasteries, the Coptic calendar, and the community's living traditions today.

item.title: Egyptian Music Culture: History & Genres
item.description: An overview of Egyptian music: Umm Kulthum and the golden age of Arab music, classical Egyptian instruments, shaabi, and the modern mahraganat scene.

item.title: Islamic Cairo: A Guide to the Medieval Quarter
item.description: A guide to Islamic Cairo: al-Muizz Street, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, key mosques and madrasas, and practical tips for exploring in 2026.

item.title: Egypt's Western Desert: Oases & Dunes Guide
item.description: An overview of Egypt's Western Desert: the five major oases, the Great Sand Sea, planning a multi-day desert circuit, and practical safety tips for 2026.

item.title: Egyptian Cuisine Guide: Dishes & Where to Eat
item.description: A guide to Egyptian cuisine: koshari, ful medames, molokhia, street food staples, regional specialties, and where to find authentic food in 2026.

item.title: Koshari: Egypt's National Dish Explained
item.description: What is koshari? The history, ingredients, and regional variations of Egypt's beloved layered rice, lentil, and pasta dish, plus where to try it in 2026.

item.title: Nile River Facts: Egypt's Lifeline Explained
item.description: Key facts about the Nile River: its length and source debate, why ancient Egypt depended on its floods, the Aswan High Dam's impact, and Nile cruises today.

item.title: Red Sea Egypt Guide: Diving, Beaches & Resorts
item.description: An overview of Egypt's Red Sea coast: why the reefs are so rich, how to choose between Sharm El Sheikh, Hurghada, El Gouna, and Dahab, and when to visit.

item.title: White Desert Egypt: Chalk Formations Guide
item.description: Plan a trip to Egypt's White Desert National Park: the chalk rock formations, overnight camping, how to get there from Farafra or Bahariya, and tips for 2026.

item.title: Dahab Guide: Egypt's Laid-Back Diving Town
item.description: Plan your trip to Dahab: the Blue Hole, freediving culture, Bedouin camps, Mount Sinai treks, and practical tips for this relaxed Red Sea town in 2026.

item.title: Hurghada Guide: Red Sea Beaches & Water Sports
item.description: Plan your trip to Hurghada: Giftun Island snorkeling, kitesurfing at El Gouna, desert safaris, best time to visit, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Sharm El Sheikh Guide: Diving & Resort Life
item.description: Plan your trip to Sharm El Sheikh: Ras Mohammed National Park, Tiran Island diving, Naama Bay, best time to visit, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Siwa Oasis Guide: Egypt's Remote Desert Town
item.description: Plan your trip to Siwa Oasis: the Oracle Temple, Siwan Berber culture, salt lakes, Great Sand Sea excursions, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Alexandria Travel Guide: Egypt's Mediterranean City
item.description: Plan your visit to Alexandria: the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Qaitbay Citadel, catacombs, Mediterranean corniche, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Aswan Travel Guide: Nubian Culture & the Nile
item.description: Plan your visit to Aswan: the High Dam, Philae Temple, Abu Simbel day trips, Nubian villages, felucca sailing, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Cairo Complete Guide: Neighborhoods & Sights
item.description: A complete guide to Cairo: Islamic Cairo, Downtown, Zamalek, Giza, getting around the city, when to visit, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Luxor Travel Guide: Ancient Thebes & Monuments
item.description: Plan your visit to Luxor, ancient Thebes: Karnak and Luxor temples, the Valley of the Kings, hot air balloon rides, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Grand Egyptian Museum: Complete Visitor Guide
item.description: Plan your visit to the Grand Egyptian Museum near Giza: what's inside, the complete Tutankhamun collection, ticket types, opening hours, and practical tips.

item.title: Egyptian Hieroglyphs: How Ancient Writing Worked
item.description: How Egyptian hieroglyphs actually worked as a writing system: phonetic and word signs, cartouches, hieratic and demotic scripts, and how they were deciphered.
